protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of the SARS-CoV-2 Inactivation Efficacy Associated With Buffers From Three Kits Used on High-Throughput RNA Extraction Platforms
Detergent_products_unresolved_for_lysis: QIAamp 96 Virus QIAcube HT Kit lysis buffer (Qiagen ACL/ATL)
MagMAX Pathogen RNA/DNA kit lysis binding buffer
MagMAX Viral/Pathogen Nucleic Acid Isolation kit lysis binding buffer
protocols.Evidence: lysis buffer preparations, 200 ul of virus in VTM was added; incubated for 10 min at room temperature; heat-treated tubes incubated at 75C; samples centrifuged at 6,000 x g

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of the SARS-CoV-2 Inactivation Efficacy Associated With Buffers From Three Kits Used on High-Throughput RNA Extraction Platforms
Detergent_products_unresolved_for_lysis: MagMAX Pathogen RNA/DNA kit lysis binding buffer (contains Zwittergent)
protocols.Evidence: MagMAX lysis binding buffer that contained GITC and the detergent Zwittergent; with addition of 2-propanol; required multiple wash steps and centrifugation
samples are sequentially mixed with lysis buffer and then followed with heat treatment; heating sample to 68C for 15 min; heat inactivation does not adversely affect PCR
